3134750.name: Solar - Survival Space Battle Simulator
3134750.description:
Welcome to Solar
  • Survive in the depths of space
  • Expand your fleet and customize your spaceships
  • Face up to 12 boss enemies and dominate the universe

Engage in battles against enemy fleets and numerous bosses
SOLAR is a comprehensive tactical simulator for epic battles between various spaceships. Wave after wave, you strategically place your ships, continuously expand your fleet, and equip them with diverse components to customize your spaceships. Each part of the fleet assumes a special role in combat, but through the targeted use of components, you can adjust and optimize your tactical focus as needed.

Gain decisive advantages in battle by using badges and rewards obtained after victorious fights. These additional resources enable you to prepare for greater challenges and withstand even the most powerful spaceships.

Configure your spaceships as you need them
Each spaceship is uniquely armed, whether with railguns, lasers, or beam cannons, and has special shields that enable it to respond appropriately in various combat situations. Whether your fleet primarily consists of imposing capital ships or you prefer to lead a multitude of agile frigates into battle is up to you.

Do you rely on the firepower and versatility of carrier ships with their numerous fighters, or do you prefer the defensive strength of massive shields to protect your ships? The choice is entirely yours. Moreover, SOLAR offers countless possibilities to customize your fleet and its equipment to suit your personal playstyle.

Obtain components, resources, and badges
Manage your resources wisely, develop sophisticated strategies, and adapt your tactics to be successful in the diverse battles. With each battle won, you gain valuable experience and collect useful rewards that will be of great benefit to you as the game progresses. Prepare to gain the upper hand in intense space battles and make a name for yourself as a fearless commander.
3134750.supported_languages:
英语*, 德语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
